label: Carrozzeria

beats.name: HOOK
beats.video_prompt: A dented BMW Serie 3 in an Italian body shop, crumpled left door. The shop owner walks among five cars in different repair stages. Phone rings, he answers while walking. Then it rings again. He walks between cars like in a maze, unable to finish a sentence. Harsh workshop fluorescent light, documentary handheld, desaturated tones, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

beats.name: PROBLEM
beats.video_prompt: Close-up of paper repair estimate with corrections, arrows, crossed-out numbers. Hand places it on desk already covered with other papers. Phone ringing in background, ignored. Harsh office light, cluttered desk, documentary close-up, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

voiceover.text: Due virgola otto milioni di sinistri in Italia ogni anno. Ogni macchina in officina: dodici giorni di riparazione. Dodici giorni in cui il cliente chiama ogni tre giorni. Quattro telefonate per sinistro.

beats.name: AGITATION
beats.video_prompt: Cluttered body shop office desk with stacked papers and ringing phone. No one present. Through window, cars waiting for repair. Cold harsh light, still camera, heavy silence, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

beats.name: SOLUTION
beats.video_prompt: Same body shop owner standing calmly next to a car being repaired. Phone is silent. Screen shows '3 clienti aggiornati automaticamente'. The desk in background is cleaner. He breathes, relaxed. Warm afternoon light through workshop window, saturated warm tones, smooth tracking shot, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

voiceover.text: Con FLUXION, lo stato di riparazione va su WhatsApp da solo. Autorizzazione ricevuta, iniziamo domani mattina. Il cliente non chiama piu. Sa gia tutto. Zero abbonamenti. Zero commissioni.
FLUXION. Quattrocentonovantasette euro. Una volta. Per sempre.

lines.text: Il gestionale che non ti costa ogni mese

video_gen_config.negative_prompt: text overlay, watermarks, logos, brand names, blurry, distorted faces, low quality, overexposed, artifacts, generic stock footage, CGI, artificial
video_gen_config.style_prefix: Cinematic 4K, gritty documentary, authentic Italian body shop, industrial realism

music_gen_config.genre_hint: industrial atmospheric, low synth with metallic textures, workshop ambience

prompts.tense: dark industrial ambient, low metallic drone, sparse reverb hits, tense workshop atmosphere, minor key, 80bpm, no vocals
prompts.uplifting: resolving industrial theme, warm synth pads emerging, confident clean beat, hopeful, major key, 105bpm, no vocals

wa_message:
Ciao [nome], ogni riparazione dura 12 giorni.
In 12 giorni il cliente chiama 4 volte.
Questo le manda il WhatsApp da solo. [VIDEO]
